name: wspolpracujmy-dev
postCreateCommand: sh -lc 'set -e; SLN=$(find /workspace /workspaces -maxdepth 4 -name "*.sln" 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -z "$SLN" ]; then echo "Nie znaleziono pliku .sln w /workspace ani /workspaces"; echo "Zawartosc /workspace:"; ls -la /workspace 2>/dev/null || true; echo "Zawartosc /workspaces:"; ls -la /workspaces 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; echo "Restore: $SLN"; dotnet restore "$SLN"'
